42.reason: Missing NULL check for pointer c; if c is NULL, dereferencing c->left causes segmentation fault.

46.reason: Calls print_leaf on NULL when left child does not exist; results in dereferencing NULL pointer inside the function.

40.reason: Missing NULL check for parameter c causes segmentation fault when recursively calling with NULL child pointers.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // Missing null-pointer check; accessing c->left/right when c is NULL causes undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing NULL check for parameter c causes segmentation fault when recursively calling with NULL child pointers.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing NULL check for parameter c. When recursively calling print_leaf on a NULL child pointer, accessing c->left will cause a segmentation fault.
